column1: Hey Michael Frins, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. Which destination were you looking to book?
firee grand o has been super popular, gonna be lit this year
how many ppl in your group so far?
just 2 it's so late my boys alr got like 10 going
feel you bro lets get this locked in lol, what school we comin from? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
oh fire bro I went to Salve, will def hook it up for you guys
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
yeah i've seen yall in newport bunch of times
Yea bro lol, I run a bunch of the events in Newport, def gotta come say wassup next time you down here
Loved “Yea bro lol, I run a bunch of the events in Newport, def gotta come say wassup next time you down here”
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
i've been looking at a bunch of website but saw u guys on ig and decided to text u
thats wassup bro I appreciate it, you'll love it out there for sure
cool if i send this through email? its a little long for text
word whats the best email for you?
just sent that bro lmk if you got it
i clicked grand oasis and it says 900 per room for 2?
so is that 450 a person just to make sure
you lookin to do the 4 night or 5?
Loved “you lookin to do the 4 night or 5?”
also is there anyway to get saturday to saturday instead of saturday to thursday?
so rn we can't do the 7-14, we are sold out of rooms from the 13-17
and yea for 5 nights its 909 per person, for the entire stay all inclusive
i'll let u know by the end of the day today do tmr for sure
the price is good for 5 days but i wanna see if i can get a cheap spot for rh 7 days but i doubt it so i'll definitely text u back. Just gonna call my boy first
word lmk bro, once y'all are ready i can set you up with a reservation
also if there any reason you wanna do the 7 days?
Loved “word lmk bro, once y'all are ready i can set you up with a reservation”
our friend staying for 7 so i'd be more fun but 5 is honestly chill
gotcha, yea tbr bro 7 is a bit overkill lol. 5 is the sweet spot where you were there just long enough, but you're not burnt out
7 days of all inclusive is a lot on the body lolol
i just did 7 days with my boys at tennessee and they are fucking insane
i'll def hit u up later today im 75% sure ill book with u and figure out airfare
it was worth it tho sm fun
word yea bro lmk, would be dope to have y'all with us
i'll most likely text u tn after work and i'll book it
aight bet lmk, we should be good to go for tonight I'll lyk if i see rooms selling out
u mind helping me out im gonna check this out
i'm on the link u send me clicking 2 per room
bet! were you lookin to lock that in?
yeah it says 4 passengers tho and i clicked on 2 passengers
word those are just sample quotes brotha, i can send you over the actual rn for the two of you
y'all were lookin to lock it in today?
bet, will send this over in a few
bet bro i just sent that over, lmk if you guys need any help navigating it
900 per person, for the whole trip
ok so it says balance due
you can send him the link, each person can hop on and make their own accounts/payments
that way someone doesn't have to do it for everyone, lil easier on you lol
i'll figure this out and text u if i have any concerns
bet! and today, we only have a handful of rooms left so i can't hold it that long
trips a month away so we are super low on availability
yeah we are dumb as fuck should've done this months ago
aye bro better now than never lol, a day or two from today and it'll be sold out
Liked “aye bro better now than never lol, a day or two from today and it'll be sold out”
does my friend sign in my with my acc or his own one
nahh he can make his own account
ok we are good to go we will have the money in by tn we are just buying plane tickets
yssir thanks for the help on short notice
ofc bro, gotta take care of my RI people lol
he'll yeah i'll see u in newport soon fs
does it show check in time? i'm trying to get a flight home i wanna see what time it would be
check in is technically at 3pm, but you can show up whenever and they'll give you a wristband so you can eat/drink and chill til the rooms ready, and checkout is 11am
yo is there anyway we can change the dates for monday the 9th to the 13th?
my boy is not tryna miss his work on saturday i'm wondering if there's any possibility of changing it
also the flights are 50% cheaper too for a roundtrip from monday-friday so lmk
yea bro we can do those dates, so 4 nights instead?
so monday-thursday is available and monday-friday is if i'm correct
yessir we can do the 9-13(4 night) but not the 9-14
so checkin on the 9th and checkout the 13th
ok sounds for the 9-13th can we push the payment back to tmr night instead of tn
just so we have more time to figure it out
sorry for the inconvenience my friend is acc an idiot
ahh unfortunately we'd have to gamble and check tomorrow if rooms are available, I won't be able to hold this room past today
ok that's fine let me get back to u in abt 30? is that cool?
but for the 9-13 its a little cheaper, gonna be $734 a person now since it's 4 nights instead of 5
bet yea thats cool bro, i updated the res for the dates/pricing for you
yo can u send me a new email for the 4 night trip now
my boy is abt to pay
i'll have this payment in right after we get our flight en
Bet! Yea I'll write up the email, but if you click on the original link I sent it's the same link, I updated the payment and dates for you so he can use that
yeah i see it's updated but my friends instead
word I just resent it, link and everything is updated. He should be able to just hop on the original link using his login and it'll be updated for him to make the payment
lmk if he needs any help
my friend got an hour left of driving and we are gonna buy it asap
yo my friend i filling out the form rn
ok he is in my bad
do we have to fill out the forms or is that after we pay
yoo you can fill everything out after you pay, doesn't have to be right this second
like passport info and all that
so i'm on the "make payment" tab
do i fill all this out and then pay
word yea so just click "make payment" then you can go through the agreement into the portal to pay
how do we get the bus service from the airport to the resort
once you book you can add in your flight info, and we will schedule your airport transfers, you'll get emails with all that info
do we give you our passport information
you can add that onto your account, doesn't have to be right this minute tho, whenever you put your flight info in you can do it then
do we ever have to put our passport in or no because we have different flights not through you guys
yea you still do, so the resort can cross reference/confirm who's in the room
do we have to do that today? or just before we go
whenever you go to put your flights in bro, doesn't have to be right this second
ok bet thank u for the help
next step is when you get your flights to enter the info on your portals, so we can schedule your airport transfers to the resort
ok bet sounds good thanks for the help
yessir! lmk if you need anything
bet thank u for or the help
i added the flight me and my boy have the exact same flight is it fine if we just have one flight under
You both gotta add it, just so operations know exactly who's arriving and when
Yo we added the flights couple days ago, when do we get information on the car to the resort?
yo! You'll be getting an email in a day or so that will have all the info you need
yoyo! just emailed over the info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
No, thanks, but thank you for sending the transportation service over.
What is the party package though?
party pass is dope comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events
venues like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, HOF, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, and more
word just saw up to 48 hours before u can add it. So i'll consider it thank you🙏👍
yo we at cancun airport and don't see the go blue tours sign for the car service
Yo! They get in contact with you?
Did you follow the pathways all the way out to the exit
yo whats good bro! Just wanted to check in, how did the trip go?
trip was fire hella fun, everyone at go blue was great
good call on the 5 days instead of 7 we drank the entire bar body was shaking ode on friday
thank u for u help again trip was best week ever ngl
yoo! thats so lit bro I'm glad you had a time. happy I could help
I may need to bug y'all for a google review if thats cool lol. can just mention me and say how lit the trip was. I'll send you the link to it if y'all up for it
Here's the Google link. It'll make you log into your Gmail before leaving the review https://g.page/r/CfotMQx2RsgmEAE/review
Can keep it super simple don't need anything too crazy
busy asf today i'll do it tn
word no rush bro! whenever you can
just rated 5 stars thanks for the trip
Means a lot fam! Thank you
Let's def stay connected bro, what's your IG? I'll add you
i think i follow you already if you run the newport nightlife acc
i'll def see u soon in newport once the weather warms up
Betttttt bro yea I follow you on my personal
fasho, thanks again for setting up the trip it was great and will def let u kno if im in newport
